title: The Cohens and the Kellys in Paris
writer: Alfred A. Cohn, Albert DeMond, Jack Mintz
actors: George Sidney, J. Farrell MacDonald, Vera Gordon
plot: The Jewish Nate Cohen and the Irish-Catholic Patrick Kelly are business partners who are constantly fighting. When they find out that Nate's daughter Sadye and Patrick's son Pat Jr. are getting married in Paris, the two and their ...
